levels.LEVEL_1: exact shared GORILA sign-ID (the tier-A AB set)
levels.LEVEL_2: palaeographic equivalence classes (== LEVEL_1 until allographs clustered)
levels.LEVEL_3: projected LB phonetic values — FIREWALLED, ablation only

meta.blindness: built only from the SigLA sign catalogue + LA attestation counts; no phonetic value, no toponym, no pair ledger is read (enforced by test_ab_equivalence_blindness)
meta.deferred_refinement: per-graph palaeographic B/C sub-tiering + disputed flags via Salgarella 2020 (corpus/bronze/salgarella_2020/, held locally) — NOT applied; tier A rests on SigLA's AB-class designation.

equivalence.graphic_similarity_basis: SigLA AB-class (conventional A/B homomorph); GORILA shared numbering
equivalence.source_authority: SigLA (Salgarella & Castellan); GORILA (Godart & Olivier); Ventris-Chadwick AB convention
equivalence.chronological_scope: LA (MM II-LM IB) vs LB (LM II-III) — cross-horizon by construction
